title: ilex laureola
intro: Ilex laureola, also known as holly-leaved inkberry, is a shrub native to eastern North America, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves that resemble holly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex laureola include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Ilex laureola can be prepared in herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems.
